title: Baked Asparagus Fish
excerpt: Ingredients 1 x 430 g tin asparagus 750 g thick stockfish fillets (hake) salt and pepper 250 ml grated cheese 45 ml butter 45 ml cake flour 2.5 ml mustard powder about 100 ml milk Method Drain the asparagus but keep the liquid. Season fish to taste with salt and …
html:
Ingredients

  • 1 x 430 g tin asparagus
  • 750 g thick stockfish fillets (hake)
  • salt and pepper
  • 250 ml grated cheese
  • 45 ml butter
  • 45 ml cake flour
  • 2,5 ml mustard powder
  • about 100 ml milk

Method

Drain the asparagus but keep the liquid.

Season the fish to taste with salt and pepper and place it in an ovenproof dish.

Pack the asparagus on top of the fish, cover and set aside.

Melt the butter in a small saucepan and stir in the flour.

Stir until there are no lumps and let the mixture cook briefly to cook the flour through.

Now slowly pour in the asparagus liquid while stirring constantly.

Also add enough milk to make a thick white sauce.

Spoon the sauce over the fish and sprinkle with cheese.

Bake at 180°C for 30 minutes or until done.

Serves 4 with mashed potatoes and roasted vegetables.

Easy!
